name: usd_converter
description: Converts a USD amount to GBP, EUR, and JPY using fixed exchange rates
returnDescription: An object containing the converted amounts in GBP, EUR, and JPY
code: const amount = parseFloat(usd_amount); if (isNaN(amount)) { return { error: 'Invalid USD amount provided' }; } const gbp = (amount * 0.79).toFixed(2); const eur = (amount * 0.93).toFixed(2); const jpy = (amount * 156.01).toFixed(2); return { USD: `$${amount.toFixed(2)}`, GBP: `£${gbp}`, EUR: `€${eur}`, JPY: `¥${jpy}` };
creator: Bjorn
